crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY External IP Lookup maxmind.com
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY External IP Lookup maxmind.com"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.uri; content:"/locate_my_ip"; fast_pattern; http.header; content:"maxmind.com"; reference:md5,0559c56d6dcf6ffe9ca18f43e225e3ce; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2019140; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2014_09_09, former_category POLICY, updated_at 2020_09_25;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO DYNAMIC_DNS Query to a Suspicious no-ip Domain
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO DYNAMIC_DNS Query to a Suspicious no-ip Domain"; dns.query; content:".no-ip."; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2013743; rev:7; metadata:created_at 2011_10_05, former_category INFO, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2020_08_17;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Observed DNS Query to .biz TLD
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO Observed DNS Query to .biz TLD"; dns.query; content:".biz"; nocase; endswith; reference:url,www.spamhaus.org/statistics/tlds/; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2027863; rev:5; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2019_08_13, deployment Perimeter, former_category INFO, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2020_09_17;)
